LSR FOR 7/24/2019. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR. LIMB DAMAGE, SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES WITH SOMEWHAT DENSE COVERAGE AT FOX COUNTY PARK. REPORTS OF LARGE TREES ON A CAR AND SOME CAMPERS. TREE SIZES VARIED FROM 6 INCH TO 2-3 FEET IN DIAMETER.
